evals.prompt: Add before/after screenshots to PR #42 in a public GitHub repo. External upload is forbidden. The screenshots are already committed under docs/pr/42/before.png and docs/pr/42/after.png on branch visual-polish.
evals.expected_output: Agent checks repo visibility, uses raw.githubusercontent.com URLs for the public repo, updates the PR body with a Before/After table, and verifies the raw URL returns image bytes.

evals.prompt: The PR image in private repo zhongjis/better-521 is 404ing. Fix the PR body. Screenshot file exists at docs/pr-artifacts/pr-13/recommendation-spotlight.png on branch try-luck.
evals.expected_output: Agent checks repo visibility, recognizes the repo is private, avoids bare raw.githubusercontent.com, uses a GitHub web/raw or blob?raw=true URL, verifies the file with gh api, and reports the private-repo caveat.

evals.prompt: Take PR screenshots for a private repo, but do not upload externally and do not commit new files. I just need the PR image to show for reviewers.
evals.expected_output: Agent does not use 0x0.st/Gist/raw.githubusercontent.com; explains that uncommitted files cannot render in a PR body, recommends GitHub PR attachment flow or asks approval to commit images/private-safe upload, and avoids claiming completion without render verification.
